response.justification: Bogdan has strong senior-level experience in software engineering with diverse technologies, including TypeScript and cloud infrastructure, but his direct experience with AI-gen systems, vector databases, and RAG architectures is limited. His recent role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, which partially aligns with the job requirements. However, his background leans more toward general software development and DevOps rather than specialized AI-gen work.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple high-scale projects
Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (e.g., at re:cinq and Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases and RAG architectures
No explicit mention of LLM performance metrics or multi-agent system frameworks
Mostly general software engineering experience; lacks depth in applied GenAI/cloud delivery
